name: runnatics-ui
description: Claude Code plugin for Runnatics.Ui — a React 19 + TypeScript + Vite race management platform with MUI, AG Grid, SignalR, Axios services, and Zustand/React Query state management.
author: Runnatics Team

agents.name: react-agent
agents.description: Primary agent for all React component, service, hook, and page development in Runnatics.Ui

commands.name: new-component
commands.description: Scaffold a new component folder with .tsx, .types.ts, useHook.ts, and index.ts

skills.name: react-component
skills.description: Generate a complete React component following Runnatics conventions

instructions: ALWAYS read .claude/CONTEXT.md before starting any task
ALWAYS update .claude/CONTEXT.md after completing a task
Never use 'any' in TypeScript — strict mode is enforced
All API IDs are encrypted strings, never numeric
API calls go through src/main/src/services/ only — never in components
Use @/ path alias for imports from src/
